issues.description: PowerBoost target should specify 'Leader or Character' with scope 'ChooseOwnLeaderOrCharacter', not just 'ChooseOwnCharacter'
KO target missing required condition: must target 'rested Characters'. Current DSL lacks 'HasRestingDon' or equivalent rested state condition
Extraneous second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and KO action with maxCost:5 has no basis in card text. Counter ability should be single effect with OnAttacked trigger only

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Counter] Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +4000 power during this battle. Then, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's rested Characters with a cost of 3 or less.
